pi_items.source: Verified from export_result.sh which defines IMAGE_PATH='/home/ga/DICOM/exports/cobb_angle_result.png' and checks for its existence.
Verified from export_result.sh which defines TEXT_PATH='/home/ga/DICOM/exports/measurement_type.txt' and reads its content.
Verified from verifier.py which checks if 'cobb' in text_content.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a DICOM file selected via a find command in setup_task.sh. Nominally, it picks up a real X-ray Angiography sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM) during environment setup. Although setup_task.sh contains python logic to generate a synthetic spine phantom if no DICOM is found, this fallback is not triggered because the generic find command inadvertently picks the first available DICOM file from the baseline environment. The output paths for the screenshot and measurement text file, as well as the 'cobb' keyword checked in verifier.py, exactly match the metadata claims.
